name: Asgard “Hammer” Automatic Taper
description_full: Introducing the Asgard® "HAMMER™" Automatic Taper, setting a new standard for value in drywall tools. This innovative taper seamlessly applies joint tape and precisely measures joint compound, revolutionizing taping efficiency. The AT01-AD model boasts stainless steel side plates, a hard anodized push rod, and a cable drum, ensuring durability and corrosion resistance for long-lasting performance. Enhanced with enclosed rollers on the control tube for a comfortable grip and hand protection, the HAMMER also features a control tube flange for tape cutting convenience during high ceiling applications. With a streamlined tube protector design for maximum comfort and effortless maintenance, experience unparalleled ease and efficiency without the need for additional tools.

name: Asgard 2.5" Angle Head
description_full:
The Asgard® 2.5" Angle Head streamlines the process of feathering joint compound on both sides of internal corners with precision in a single pass. Ideal for wall-to-wall or wall-to-ceiling corners, this tool is an essential component of the taping process. After the joint tape is set into the corner using a

Corner roller, the 2.5" Angle Head efficiently wipes down the corner, ensuring seamless results.
description_short: The Asgard® 2.5" Angle Head streamlines the process of feathering joint compound on both sides of internal corners with precision in a single pass. Ideal for wall-to-wall or wall-to-ceiling corners, this tool is an essential component of the taping process. After the joint tape is set into the corner using acorner roller, the 2.5" Angle Head efficiently wipes down the corner, ensuring seamless results.

name: Asgard 3" Angle Head
description_full: The Asgard® Adjustable Angle Head perfectly feathers the joint compound applied to both sides of internal corners in one pass. The Angle Head can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool's “adjustable” feature refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the angle head. Angle Heads, or Angle Finishers or Corner Finishers, are attached to the CA08-AD corner applicator to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. The 3” Asgard Angle Head has wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and is spring-loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. The Angle Head is also part of the Taping process when attached to the FH-AD or XH-AD support handles with the CFA-AD adapter.

name: Asgard 3" Nail Spotter
description_full:
Asgard 3" Nail Spotter: Advanced Drywall Tools

Discover the unparalleled durability and functionality of Asgard Taping Tools by TapeTech without the added markup. The Asgard 3" Nail Spotter is a versatile tool for any job size, perfect as a single spotter system. It features an EasyClean® Lid, a quick-release latch, and a gasket system similar to a flat box, allowing easy access and hassle-free clean-up. The traditional style skid plate serves as both a pivot point and screw detector, preventing blade damage. This nail spotter includes an NSA-TT adapter, which attaches to the interchangeable fiberglass handle (FHTT) and interchangeable extendable handle (XHTT) and is sold separately. This spotter is constructed from high-quality stainless steel and is built to last and resist rust and deterioration.
